title: Stale or missing VersionTag in script/module headers
description: Files with missing, outdated, or malformed VersionTag comments break version consistency tracking. The canonical format is '<!-- VersionTag: YYMM.B#.vMAJOR.MINOR -->' for XHTML and '# VersionTag: YYMM.B#.vMAJOR.MINOR' for PS1/PSM1. Stale tags indicate files that were not included in the last version bump cycle.
detection_method: Regex scan for VersionTag line, compare value against current version from pwsh-app-config-BASE.json
preventionRule: All production .ps1, .psm1, .xhtml, .bat files must have a VersionTag matching the current release version. Version bumps must include all tracked files.
remedy: Run Update-VersionTag from PwShGUI-VersionManager module to synchronise all VersionTags to the current version.
